message:
feat(raptorq): add proof replay verification and expanded test coverage

Proof replay verification (proof.rs):
- Add DecodeProof::replay_and_verify() to re-decode symbols and verify
  the proof trace matches the recorded execution
- Add ReplayError enum with Mismatch and SequenceMismatch variants for
  detailed divergence reporting
- Use DetHasher instead of DefaultHasher for deterministic content_hash()
- Add compare_proofs() helper for field-by-field proof comparison
- Derive PartialEq, Eq on DecodeProof for test assertions

Decoder integration (decoder.rs):
- Extended decode_with_proof() integration with replay verification
- Minor formatting adjustments

Linear algebra (linalg.rs):
- Formatting cleanup for consistency

Conformance tests (tests.rs, raptorq_conformance.rs):
- Additional test cases for determinism verification
- Tests validate that replay produces identical proof artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
